items.how_used: 使用0-1线性规划模型，以13x13的0-1矩阵表示节点是否被选为滑雪道节点，通过Lingo求解优化滑雪道总长度。
items.source_excerpt: we construct a 13-by-13 0-1 matrix, seeking all the potential ski slopes as decision variables. ... we fill the matrix with 1 or 0 to show whether the node is used after optimizing the solution using Lingo.

items.how_used: 使用层次分析法（AHP）构建多准则决策分析，准则包括总距离、可滑雪面积、垂直落差、雪道数量、难度分布、缆车数量和年降雪量，通过成对比较矩阵确定权重，对设计进行排名。
items.source_excerpt: we go through an analytic hierarchy process to construct a clear criteria and apply it to our design. The major criteria include the total distance, skiable acres, vertical drop, number of runs, distribution of difficulty, number of lifts, and annual snowfall.

items.how_used: 应用聚类分析（K-Means）将山峰分组，找出典型山峰和碗状地形，用于线性规划模型中的节点选择。
items.source_excerpt: we apply Cluster Analysis to group the peaks into different groups to find the typical peaks and bowls that can be applied to the Linear Programming (0-1 matrix) Model.

items.how_used: 使用Lingo软件求解0-1线性规划模型，优化滑雪道节点选择和路径设计。
items.source_excerpt: after optimizing the solution using Lingo.

items.how_used: 明确列出三条假设：滑雪道不重叠、区域内均可建雪道、数据准确，并给出合理性说明。
items.source_excerpt: 1. Assume the skiing slopes will not overlap; ... 2. Assume the area within the ranch can construct a ski slope; ... 3. Assume the the data given are accurate and precise;

items.how_used: 摘要部分概述了问题、方法（0-1矩阵、聚类分析、层次分析法）和主要结果（设计21条雪道，总长超160公里，排名第6）。
items.source_excerpt: Abstract: ... we construct 21 skiing routes with 1-2-2 difficulty level distribution and a total slope length over 160 kilometers. ... we apply Cluster Analysis ... Linear Programming ... analytic hierarchy process ...

items.how_used: 引言部分包括背景（冬奥会激发滑雪热情）和问题重述，明确目标：设计滑雪道并评估竞争力。
items.source_excerpt: II. Introduction ... A. Background ... B. Problem Restatement ...

items.how_used: 在附件中提供了滑雪道具体位置和距离的图示，展示最终设计布局。
items.source_excerpt: Attachment: The specific location and distance of each skiing slope: [image]
